name: SeaTags - BETA
description: Browse, search, sort and filter the Seanime marketplace by community status tags (Working / Broken / Deprecated), type and VirusTotal flags — pulled from the Seanime-Marketplace tag list.
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Reads the community marketplace tag list (Working/Broken/Deprecated) from raw.githubusercontent.com so you can filter extensions by their reported status, and calls your local Seanime server (localhost / 127.0.0.1) to install an extension when you click Install.
